first_edit_group.instruction: Remove weak words (very/really), avoid repetition, and tighten the introduction while keeping the same facts.
first_edit_group.exact_fragment: Marie Curie was born Maria Sklodowska on November 7, 1867, in Warsaw, Poland. She was very much interested in learning from a very young age. Her family was really really dedicated to education and academic pursuits.
first_edit_group.suggested_text: Marie Curie was born Maria Sklodowska on November 7, 1867, in Warsaw, Poland. From an early age, she showed a strong interest in learning. Her family valued education and academic life.

(1) Weak/overused intensifiers appear throughout (\"very\", \"really\", \"absolutely\", \"amazing\", \"truly\"), including stacked repetition (\"really really\") that reads informal and imprecise. (2) Redundancy/tautology: \"very difficult and very challenging,\" \"hard work and dedication\" repeated, \"forever and ever,\" and \"has never been repeated... ever before or since\". (3) Cliches/generic phrasing: \"pursue her dreams,\" \"changed science forever,\" \"paid off,\" \"overcome any obstacle,\" \"legacy shows\". (4) Clarity/accuracy framing: several sentences overclaim or are awkwardly structured (e.g., \"inspiring to everyone who knew her personally\"; Nobel line overstates uniqueness).
